headline: Has Danaher (DHR) Weak Share Price Opened A Valuation Opportunity?
summary: If you are wondering whether Danaher at around US$187 per share now reflects good value or lingering caution, you are not alone. The stock has recently seen a 2.3% decline over the last week, an 11.3% decline over the last month, and is down 18.8% year to date and 10.5% over the past year, which may change how you think about its risk and return trade off. These price moves sit against a backdrop where Danaher continues to attract investor attention as a large life sciences and diagnostics...
